data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Cancellation and no-show rates', but the evidence provided does not explicitly confirm that this requirement is satisfied. While the linked use case mentions a no-show rate of 8% and its reduction from 15% after SMS reminders, it lacks detailed information on how these rates are tracked or reported in the system. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage as the evidence does not provide a comprehensive view of cancellation metrics or their implications.
gaps: Lack of detailed tracking and reporting mechanisms for cancellation rates.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
